verdicts.title: Per-tool call cap has 3+ divergent sources and a dead scaling path
verdicts.note: deep_agent_builder.py:44 bakes suffix cap=5; settings.py:117 defaults 6; models.py:120 copies onto ModelConfig then depth.py:127-130 scales it, but `.tool_call_budget` is only ever read at depth.py:129 (self-scaling) — no enforcement consumer; real cap is ToolBudgetRecord.max_calls_per_run=6 (in_memory/runtime_api_store.py:172); format_web_subagent_suffix(cap) is called with an arg only in tests.

verdicts.title: Async subagent lifecycle unreachable from production
verdicts.note: AsyncSubagentLifecycle/SubagentRunner/InMemoryAsyncTaskStore (runner.py), SubagentHandoffBuilder/Policy (handoff.py) and SubagentTask/SubagentResult contracts are imported only by delegation/subagents/__init__.py and tests (test_prd_acceptance.py, subagents/*); no src consumer — real delegation is the in-process deepagents task tool in atlas_task_tool.py.

verdicts.title: Domain imports the API layer (subagent_trace + pricing)
verdicts.note: context/memory/subagent_trace.py:30-38 imports runtime_api.schemas + agent_runtime.api.ports and re-defines StreamTextHelper (subagent_trace.py:55) mirroring runtime_worker/stream_messages.py:12 to dodge the cycle; pricing/refresh_loop.py:22 and upsert_planner.py:16 import agent_runtime.api.ports.PersistencePort; test_import_boundaries.py only bans retired LEGACY_MODULE_PATHS, not domain→api direction.

verdicts.title: Supervisor prompt contradicts itself on checkpoint discipline
verdicts.note: prompts/runtime.py:20-25 still says 'emit a short progress checkpoint as a plain-text message before calling another tool' — the exact wording deep_agent_builder.py:36-44 documents as causing loop termination — while the layered suffix at deep_agent_builder.py:56-64 mandates 'Do NOT emit a checkpoint without an accompanying tool call'.

verdicts.title: Training opt-out weaker than presented
verdicts.note: provider_kwargs.py:67 emits speculative header 'anthropic-disable-training' (comment 48-51 admits it is a canonical-to-be-updated placeholder); gemini entry is {} (line 73); _NO_PROVIDER_FLAG (line 55) is referenced only in its own comment and never wired, so the promised absent-flag warning never fires.

verdicts.title: runtime_config drops trace_metadata for root runs
verdicts.note: runtime.py:59-61 nests `metadata.update(MetadataRedactor.redact(context.trace_metadata))` inside `if context.parent_trace_id is not None:`, so root runs drop it; the only test (test_runtime_observability.py:80) exercises make_harness with parent_trace_id set (line 56), pinning the child path only and leaving the root drop unasserted — consistent with the finding's substance.

verdicts.title: Assorted unreachable surface in execution (ConfiguredRuntimeGraph, feature_flags, helpers)
verdicts.note: ConfiguredRuntimeGraph (graph.py:48) referenced only by __init__ re-export + test (line 185); langgraph.json uses create_graph→UnconfiguredRuntimeGraph; feature_flags round-trips (contracts.py:334, run_coordinator.py:572) but no src branch reads it; contracts.py:742 _normalize_scope and :750 _coerce_iterable have no callers (callers at :375/:395 use _normalize_scope_set).

verdicts.title: Import-time global mutation + env reads in the domain
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is: monkey-patch at factory.py import + module-global checkpointer singleton reading os.environ (deep_agent_builder.py).

verdicts.title: BudgetReservationManager docstring promises absent methods
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is: reservations.py class carries only TTL/expires_at while docstring promises reserve/consume/release/reap.

verdicts.title: SubagentArtifactsBackend sync _run_sync deadlock latent
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is: subagent_trace.py sync BackendProtocol paths block on run_coroutine_threadsafe; latent because deepagents uses async paths.

verdicts.title: Duplicate token estimators and redaction stacks
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is: token_budget.py vs budgets/estimator.py chars/4 estimators; tool_error_sanitizer vs observability redactor.

verdicts.title: ReasoningDepth wire values hand-duplicated three times
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is: depth.py StrEnum plus two TS unions in packages/api-types (index.ts, agents.ts).

verdicts.title: PromptInjectionDetector is a 5-phrase substring blocklist
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is: prompt_injection.py substring blocklist is defense-in-depth-only, trivially bypassed.
